description: Foosball statistics platform for office environments

parts.tech_stack: Java 21, Spring Boot 3.4.0, Spring Security, Spring Data JPA, PostgreSQL
parts.architecture_pattern: Layered Architecture (Controller → Service → Operation → Entity → Repository)

parts.tech_stack: Vue 3, TypeScript, Pinia, Vue Router, Tailwind CSS, Vite

integration_points.details: All data flows via REST endpoints on port 8080

integration_points.protocol: HTTP Redirect with JWT query param
integration_points.details: Post-OAuth2 redirect with JWT token to /oauth2/redirect
